chunks.section: On the importance of random genetic drift in modern evolutionary theory
chunks.text: The idea here is that drift is bad because it's an impediment to natural selection, but there's a lot more to random genetic drift than this. In fact, drift is a fundamental and important part of evolution.

chunks.section: Nearly-neutral alleles can be fixed in a population
chunks.text: Neutral and slightly deleterious alleles can be fixed in a population by random genetic drift. This is the important point that you must grasp if you are going to understand drift. It means that changes in the frequencies of alleles in a population can be due to drift and not just selection.
